steps.t: Meet with Raghnall south of Bail Cátharnakh, west of Gath Forthnír. Lorniel told you that she had heard from a Hillman named Raghnall who was seeking …
Lorniel can be found within Gath Forthnír, east of Bail Cátharnakh. You met with Raghnall and he gave you a scroll that explains how to forge a key fo…
